headline: Tax Refunds Are Here. Retail Stocks to Watch as People Sort Out Whether to Spend on Gas or Goodies.
summary: FEATURE  Man plans, god laughs. Retail investors are learning that lesson all over again. Just a few months ago, 2026 looked like it was going to be consumers’ time to shine: Tax changes meant bigger refunds were teed up, while policy watchers were hoping for potential interest-rate cuts and tariff relief.

headline: Fed Rate Raise, Pause, Or Cut At Next Week's Meeting?
summary: The upcoming FOMC meeting is expected to maintain rates at 350-375 bps. Read what justifies a rate pause and more about the market outlook here.

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Dollar Tree (DLTR) After This Year’s 20% Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Dollar Tree is still priced attractively after everything that has happened with the stock, this article focuses squarely on what the current share price might be implying about value. At a last close of US$101.97, the stock has returned 0.6% over the past 7 days, while the 1 year return sits at 22.2% and the year to date move is a 20.1% decline, with longer 3 and 5 year returns also in negative territory. These mixed returns come against a backdrop of ongoing...
